polymarket_summary.summary:

We have data: Bitcoin reach $70k in July: Yes 12% (vol $215,093). Reach $67.5k: Yes 26% (vol $152,342). Bitcoin Up or Down on July 17?: Yes 2% (vol $152,258). Price above $62k on July 17?: Yes 96% (vol $139,979).

Interpretation: High confidence (96%) that price > $62k on July 17, but low confidence (2%) that it will be up on July 17? So sentiment: mixed/bearish? The high confidence for >$62k suggests some bullish floor, but low upside. Overall maybe Mixed: because near-term floor bullish but upside limited.
